sources.PHASE_LC3946_C5_SPEC.md: LC3946-C5 spec (DRAFT, awaiting Foued final approval; pre-declared parameters)
sources.PHASE_C5_SPEC.md: LC322 C-5 spec (the LC322 C-5 protocol pattern)

field_provenance.phase: LC3946-C5 (inferred from naming convention; mirrors C-5 on LC322)
field_provenance.title: Collapse Analysis (Distribution Shift) — LC3946
field_provenance.purpose: Test whether the LC3946 C-4 utility gain (gap=1.0) survives distribution shift via 11 pre-declared population perturbations.
field_provenance.frozen_files: SHA256s of all frozen artifacts to be filled at commit time
field_provenance.perturbations.*: Pre-declared in PHASE_LC3946_C5_SPEC.md (lines declaring P1, P2, P3, P4). Frozen values below.
field_provenance.recovered_solver_identity_check: solver_016 (0-indexed position 15) is the C_genuine-recovered solver. Pre-declared P2 index lists verified to include solver_016 in P2a (in), P2b (in), P2c (in). No P2 index adjustment required. See PHASE_LC3946_C5_SPEC.md Aggregate Consistency Check section.
field_provenance.aggregate_consistency_check.*: Mirrors LC322 C-5 aggregate consistency check. Expected (WA, WR, loss) for unperturbed B1 and C_genuine.
field_provenance.survival_threshold: gap > 0 strictly (per Foued's Point 1 decision; uniform cost model, no lambda sweep)
field_provenance.no_post_hoc_adjustment_of_decision_rule: C_genuine and B1 decision rules unchanged from C-4 (carried forward from PHASE_LC3946_C5_SPEC.md)

title: Collapse Analysis (Distribution Shift) — LC3946
purpose: Test whether the LC3946 C-4 utility gain (gap=1.0) survives distribution shift via 11 pre-declared population perturbations.
authorization: Foued override (C-5 pattern, applied to LC3946)
extends_c4_constraint: no_post_hoc_adjustment_of_decision_rule (extended to LC3946-C5: C_genuine decision rule not adjusted during LC3946-C5 analysis)
c5_results_commit: PENDING (filled in follow-up commit after commit hash exists)

P1a_threshold_baseline.description: Baseline reference: failure_threshold = 0.05. Recorded for reference only; not counted as a perturbation.

P1b_threshold_0p10.description: failure_threshold = 0.10. Re-derive ground truth labels with stricter threshold.

P1c_threshold_0p20.description: failure_threshold = 0.20. Re-derive ground truth labels with stricter threshold.

P2a_solver_subsample_first_25.description: First 25 solvers of LC3946 (indices 0..24 in sorted solver_id order).

P2b_solver_subsample_last_25.description: Last 25 solvers of LC3946 (indices 5..29 in sorted solver_id order).

P2c_solver_subsample_first10_last15.description: First 10 + last 15 solvers of LC3946 (excludes middle 5 = indices 10..14).

P3a_probe_family_knockout_poset_universa.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_universal_source'.

P3b_probe_family_knockout_poset_chain.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_chain'.

P3c_probe_family_knockout_poset_antichai.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_antichain'.

P3d_probe_family_knockout_poset_lattice_.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_lattice_boolean'.

P3e_probe_family_knockout_poset_lattice_.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_lattice_two_prime'.
P3e_probe_family_knockout_poset_lattice_.note: This family contains the only observed failure for the recovered solver (solver_016). Empirical prediction: P3e will collapse the C_genuine advantage to 0 (B1 will trivially ACCEPT solver_016 because its only observed failure is removed; C_genuine will also ACCEPT trivially; gap = 0). The prediction is consistent with LC322's large_amount_stress family being the signal driver.

P3f_probe_family_knockout_poset_isolated.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'poset_isolated'.

P4_cross_population_reference.description: LC322 C-4 result is recorded as the cross-population anchor. No new execution needed for P4.

cost_model.rationale: Per Foued's Point 1 decision. No new cost-model runner. Survival threshold = gap > 0 strictly.

survival_threshold.rationale: Per Foued's Point 1 decision. gap = 0 is collapse (not survival). Ties are not admissible.

falsification_criterion.SURVIVES: gap > 0 on all 11 perturbation conditions (P1b, P1c, P2a, P2b, P2c, P3a..P3f)
falsification_criterion.PARTIALLY_SURVIVES: gap > 0 on some, gap <= 0 on others. Per-perturbation reporting only; no aggregation.

aggregate_consistency_check.check: Re-run B1 and C_genuine on unperturbed LC3946; recomputed (WA, WR, loss) must equal expected values above. Source: data/midweather_fingerprint_lc3946.json (post-C_genuine run).
aggregate_consistency_check.on_failure: STOP IMMEDIATELY. Do not record any result. Surface discrepancy for review.
aggregate_consistency_check.oracle_5case_check_also_required: lc3946_brute_force 5-case manual check must pass before any edit per DOCTOR_EXECUTION_PROTOCOL.md §3

runner_design_decision.decision: option (a): small wrapper runner that imports apply_estimator and compute_decision_loss from the existing midweather-fingerprint runner
runner_design_decision.rationale: Mirrors LC322 C-5 runner pattern (run_c5_collapse_lc322.py). Reuses existing functions, no duplication. Sidecar pass_fail matrix file written by the main midweather-fingerprint run is read by the C-5 runner to avoid 900 solver re-executions per perturbation.
